cards.front: What is the primary function of the Execution of a Complete Instruction?
cards.back: To decode and execute a complete instruction, which includes fetch, decode, and execute the instruction

cards.front: Which CPU component executes the fetched instruction?
cards.back: The Arithmetic Logic Unit (ALU) or the Central Processing Unit (CPU)

cards.front: What is the purpose of the Instruction Register?
cards.back: To hold the current instruction being executed

cards.front: What happens to the operands after decoding?
cards.back: They are either used immediately or stored in registers or memory for future use

cards.front: What is the outcome of executing a complete instruction?
cards.back: The CPU produces the result of the instruction, which is either data or control signals
